meta.title: Iron Yard CrossFit — Vancouver
meta.description: CrossFit gym in East Vancouver. Coach-led classes, no-bullshit programming, drop-ins welcome.

data.headline: Train hard. Recover. Repeat.
data.subhead: Coach-led group classes, free drop-in for first-timers, no fitness theatre. Just the work.

image.alt: Athletes in a CrossFit class at Iron Yard

items.title: CrossFit
items.description: Constantly varied, functional movement at high intensity. Scaled to every level.

items.title: Olympic Lifting
items.description: Snatch, clean, and jerk. Technique-first, programmed for progression.

items.title: Conditioning
items.description: Erg-based engine work. Run faster. Recover faster. Move better outside the gym.

items.author: Mike P.
items.text: Best coaching in the city. They actually teach you how to lift.

items.author: Sarah J.
items.text: Walked in scared. Six months later I'm hitting PRs every week. The community is the difference.

items.author: Dev T.
items.text: Coach Erin scaled every movement to my injury. I never felt left behind.

data.headline: An East Van gym, run by coaches who actually coach.
data.narrative: We opened in 2018 with one rule: every class is coached. Not a screen, not a Bluetooth speaker yelling at you — a person who watches you move, knows your name, and tells you when to stop. Eight CFL-1+ certified coaches, an Olympic-lifting specialist, and a head coach who programs every session.

data.headline: Drop in. First class on us.
data.subhead: No commitment. Just show up. We'll size your shoes if you forget yours.

data.headline: Powell Street. Easy parking on Hastings.
